method.auto_vs_python: Python continuation n, q, and s are interpolated onto AUTO log_w points; n and q use log-value interpolation.
method.auto_vs_eq92_94: Eq. 92--94 approximations are evaluated at each AUTO branch point.
method.auto_vs_digitized: AUTO n, q, and s are interpolated onto digitized paper Figure 1 w points; n and q use log-value interpolation.
